summary: Show a clear closed-state message when the final rust-diffforge workspace terminal is closed and remains mounted.

review_items.summary: Closing the final workspace terminal continues to keep one bounded terminal pane mounted, but the closed pane now displays visible Terminal Closed status text instead of an empty surface.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Render and style visible status copy in the terminal closed surface.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the authenticated desktop terminal UI and keeps the existing close/restart command behavior.
